message:
chore: Comment out wizer from CLI build

Wizer (edgebox-wizer) is not currently used in the build pipeline,
but kept available via `zig build wizer` for future use.

Benefits:
- Slightly faster `zig build cli` (skips one binary)
- Wizer still works and benefits from WAMR prebuilt caching
- Can be re-enabled by uncommenting one line

Note: QuickJS-NG is NOT in the prebuilt system because:
- Compiles fast (~2 seconds)
- Compiled directly into each binary (not a library)
- Only WAMR and Binaryen are slow (~18min total)
